summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of VIQSO Voter CRM. Backend: 31/31 pytest tests pass covering auth (admin/supervisor/worker), users RBAC, booths CRUD with worker scoping, voters CRUD with filters/search, visits, and all 5 analytics endpoints. Frontend: Login, Dashboard (KPIs, Voter Engagement chart, Political Pulse, Booth Performance), Booths list, Voters list, Survey Form (4-step wizard), Analytics (charts rendering with gradient palette), Admin Panel (Users/Booths tabs), Visits — all load and render correctly. Worker scope correctly limits visible booths/voters and hides Admin Panel link. Auth uses bcrypt + JWT (Bearer header + httpOnly cookie). Seed data created 9 booths, 9 users, 120 voters.
action_items: Note: Request doc referenced data-testid 'kpi-completion' but actual is 'kpi-completion-rate' (Dashboard.jsx line 125). Card renders correctly — only doc/testid naming mismatch. No code change required unless aligning with spec.
Booth list currently shows a stray 'Abhi' booth (no booth_number, name=5, target=20) created via earlier test calls — likely admin-added during exploration. Cleanup optional.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~735 lines — borderline acceptable but consider splitting routers into modules (auth/users/booths/voters/visits/analytics) if it grows further.

POST /api/voters allows any authenticated user (including worker) to create voters for ANY booth_id — workers should be restricted to their assigned_booth_ids on create. Currently a worker could create voter records for booths outside their scope.
PATCH /api/voters/{id} & PATCH /api/visits/{id} have no booth/role scoping — any worker can update any voter/visit by id. Add ownership check.
CORS: allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per CORS spec; allow_origin_regex='.*' makes it work but is permissive. Tighten origins for production.
Cookie set with secure=False — fine for preview, but should be True in production behind HTTPS.
No rate limiting / brute force lockout on /api/auth/login (spec mentioned 5-fail lockout in playbook_testing_instructions but not implemented).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup: 8 booths + 1 admin-created Abhi booth, 9 users (admin/supervisor/6 workers/1 test), 120 voters, 15 visits. Verified count via /api/analytics/overview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_voter_crm.py (run with `pytest backend/tests/test_voter_crm.py -v`). All endpoints verified. Frontend renders correctly with viqso gradient branding. RBAC checks pass at API level. The main agent should consider adding booth-scope checks on voter/visit write endpoints for workers (described in critical_code_review_comments) — currently a worker could write data for booths outside their scope via direct API call. UI does not expose this issue since worker only sees their booths.
rca of the issue: No active issues. All requested features verified working end-to-end.
